lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਕਾਲੈ ਵਸਿ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kaalai vas aap prabh keea |
lines.english: God Himself has made them all subject to death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਸਗਲੇ ਕੁਲ ਤਾਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਜਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aap tarai sagale kul taare har daragah pat siau jaaeidaa |6|
lines.english: You shall save yourself, and save all your generations as well. You shall go to the Court of the Lord with honor. ||6||
All the continents, nether worlds, islands and worlds

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਏਕੁ ਆਪਿ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਸੋ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਜੋ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: nihachal ek aap abinaasee so nihachal jo tiseh dhiaaeidaa |7|
lines.english: The One Imperishable Lord Himself is unmoving and unchanging. Meditating on Him, one becomes unchanging. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਤਰੰਗ ਉਠਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਤੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਸਲਲੈ ਸਲਲ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jiau jal tarang uttheh bahu bhaatee fir salalai salal samaaeidaa |8|
lines.english: The waves of the water rise up in various ways, and then the water merges again in water. ||8||
Do not think that, because of his human body, he is different.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਜੇਹਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa sevak so har jehaa |
lines.english: The Lord's servant becomes like the Lord.
A beggar begs for charity at His Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਾ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa prabh bhaavai taa kirapaa dhaarai |
lines.english: When God pleases, He takes pity on him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂੜੋ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਕਿਤੈ ਵਸਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: roorro tthaakur kitai vas na aavai |
lines.english: The Beauteous Lord and Master is not controlled in any way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਾਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨਿ ਮਨੁ ਠਹਰਾਇਦਾ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: dehu daras jit man tripataasai har keeratan man tthaharaaeidaa |9|
lines.english: Please bless me with the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, to satisfy my mind, O Lord. Through the Kirtan of Your Praises, my mind is held steady. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਲੋੜਨਿ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਾਇਨਿ ਦਰਿ ਫੇਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: keetaa lorran soee karaaein dar fer na koee paaeidaa |10|
lines.english: He does whatever they wish to be done; nothing blocks their way at His Door. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਆ ਸੰਤਾ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har so kichh kare ji har kiaa santaa bhaavai |
lines.english: The Lord does that which pleases the Saints of the Lord.
there he should meditate on the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਅਉਘਟੁ ਆਇ ਬਨਤੁ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jithai aaughatt aae banat hai praanee |
lines.english: Wherever the mortal is confronted with difficulty,
The Great Lord and Master is inaccessible and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਪੁਤ੍ਰੁ ਕਲਤ੍ਰੁ ਨ ਬੇਲੀ ਕੋਈ ਤਿਥੈ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਛਡਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: jithai putru kalatru na belee koee tithai har aap chhaddaaeidaa |11|
lines.english: Where there are no children, spouse or friends, there the Lord Himself comes to the rescue. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਟਿ ਸਿਲਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਏ ਸੋ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: kaatt silak jis maarag paae so vich sangat vaasaa paaeidaa |12|
lines.english: Those who have had the noose cut away from around their necks, whom God has set back upon the Path, obtain a place in the Sangat, the Congregation. ||12||
How can anyone meet with God, the self-suficient One?
He endures both bad and good equally.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਜਾਇ ਤ ਏਕੋ ਬੂਝੈ ਸੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: haumai jaae ta eko boojhai so guramukh sehaj samaaeidaa |13|
lines.english: When egotism is silenced, then one comes to know the One Lord. Such a Gurmukh intuitively merges in the Lord. ||13||
One who realizes the Hukam of the Lord's Command is said to be His servant.
With a child-like, innocent nature, they remain detached, turning away from the world.
The devotees of the Lord dwell forever in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਰੰਗ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਤੀ ਜਿਉ ਪਿਤਾ ਪੂਤੁ ਲਾਡਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: anik rang kareh bahu bhaatee jiau pitaa poot laaddaaeidaa |14|
lines.english: They enjoy various pleasures in many ways; God caresses them, like a father caressing his son. ||14||
He is inaccessible and unfathomable; His value cannot be estimated.
We meet Him, only when He causes us to meet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਭਇਆ ਤਿਨ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਜਿਨ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: guramukh pragatt bheaa tin jan kau jin dhur masatak lekh likhaaeidaa |15|
lines.english: The Lord is revealed to those humble Gurmukhs, who have such pre-ordained destiny inscribed upon their foreheads. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਦੁਆਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਲਾਜ ਰਖਾਇਦਾ ॥੧੬॥੧॥੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak saran peaa har duaarai har bhaavai laaj rakhaaeidaa |16|1|5|
lines.english: Servant Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of Your Door, O Lord; if it is Your Will, please preserve his honor. ||16||1||5||
You Yourself are the Creator Lord, the Cause of causes.
You created the Universe, and You support the whole earth.
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Maaroo, Solahas, Fifth Mehl:
Whatever is seen is You, O One Lord.
What the ears hear is the Word of Your Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੀ ਅਵਰ ਨ ਜਾਪਸਿ ਕਾਈ ਸਗਲ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਧਾਰਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: doojee avar na jaapas kaaee sagal tumaaree dhaaranaa |1|
lines.english: There is nothing else to be seen at all. You give support to all. ||1||
You Yourself established Yourself, O God.
You Yourself are conscious of Your Creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਇ ਰਚਿਓਨੁ ਪਸਾਰਾ ਆਪੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸਾਰਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap upaae rachion pasaaraa aape ghatt ghatt saaranaa |2|
lines.english: Creating Yourself, You formed the expanse of the Universe; You Yourself cherish and sustain each and every heart. ||2||
You created some to hold great and royal courts.
Some turn away from the world in renunciation, and some maintain their households.
